prompt: Review: Flop A-7-2 rainbow. Choose CALL for the calmer board or RAISE for the more pressure-building board.
why_v1: A-7-2 rainbow stays calmer because the board is dry and does not create many immediate draw paths.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. A-7-2 rainbow stays calmer because the flop does not create many immediate draw paths.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. A-7-2 rainbow is still the calmer board because the texture stays dry and stable.
